decision.reason: checkpoint bytes are present, but installed vLLM and four live actors already omit visual/MTP persistent parameter residency

source_findings.checkpoint_iterator_order: the default safetensors iterator materializes a tensor before the model-level StageMissing/mtp skip consumes it
source_findings.mtp_instantiation: Qwen3_5MoeMTP is selected only through a non-null speculative config
source_findings.stage_missing_registration: the wrapped original module is stored through __dict__, so it is not a registered persistent child
source_findings.tp1_expert_filter: with no local expert-id filter, the pre-read filter returns false
source_findings.vision_construction: zero image/video limits construct the tower under meta and replace the registered child with StageMissingLayer

live_residency.note: No VRAM saving is predicted because the supported full-artifact path already omits persistent visual/MTP parameters

supported_artifact_plan.reason: four live FP8 actors already have language-only named-parameter residency, so a derivative cannot remove visual or MTP parameters from steady-state residency
reopen_only_if: a fresh live audit finds visual or MTP CUDA parameters
startup checkpoint I/O is separately measured as a material bottleneck
new artifact authority explicitly accepts derivative maintenance cost

separate_future_ablation_not_bundled.reason: installed Qwen3Next may enable a fused QK-norm/RoPE/gate kernel, so it is not an artifact-only change

supported_runtime_omission.mtp: target Qwen3_5 load_weights skips mtp.*; no speculative config means Qwen3_5MoeMTP is not instantiated
supported_runtime_omission.vision: zero image/video limits activate _mark_tower_model and StageMissingLayer
